tasks.name: E2 Pilot: Official absorption metric pipeline on 5 checkpoints
tasks.description: Validate the official absorption metric pipeline (sae-spelling or SAEBench) on 5 checkpoints from GPT-2 Small and Pythia-160M. Use >=50k tokens for stable dead-neuron estimation. Confirm metric variance is reasonable before scaling.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 5 checkpoints load successfully; official absorption metric returns finite values; dead-neuron rate is stable (computed on >=50k tokens).

tasks.name: E2 Full: First-letter benchmark on GPT-2 Small (10-15 checkpoints)
tasks.description: Run official absorption metric on 10-15 GPT-2 Small checkpoints across Standard, TopK, TopK_MLP, and TopK_Attn families. Compute dead-neuron rate on >=50k tokens and test for near-zero variance families.

visualizations.description: Absorption rate distribution per GPT-2 family

tasks.name: E2 Full: First-letter benchmark on Pythia-160M (15-20 checkpoints)
tasks.description: Extract or compute official absorption metric on 15-20 Pythia-160M SAEBench checkpoints across 7 architecture families. Compute dead-neuron rate on >=50k tokens and analyze family-level variance.

visualizations.description: Absorption rate distribution per Pythia family

tasks.name: E1 Pilot: SAEBench data validation
tasks.description: Validate SAEBench metric extraction pipeline on a sample of 20 Pythia-160M SAEs. Confirm that absorption, sparse probing F1, RAVEL Cause/Isolation, L0, and CE loss recovered are all present and well-formed before running the full meta-analysis.

pilot.pass_criteria: All required metrics are present for >=18 of 20 sampled SAEs; no missing-value rate >10%.

tasks.name: E1 Full: Downstream causal cost meta-analysis
tasks.description: Extract metrics for 200+ Pythia-160M SAEBench SAEs. Compute partial correlations and run OLS regression with cluster-robust SEs to test whether absorption has a unique negative effect on sparse probing F1 and RAVEL Cause/Isolation, controlling for L0 and reconstruction.

visualizations.description: Absorption vs sparse probing F1 with partial-regression fit
Absorption vs RAVEL Cause with partial-regression fit

tasks.name: E3 Pilot: Task-agnostic absorption metric (geography domain)
tasks.description: Pilot a task-agnostic absorption metric on 1 SAE (Pythia-160M or GPT-2 Small, layer 8) using 10 geography parent-child pairs. Train logistic regression probes on residual-stream activations and classify absorption cases. Given prior refutation of H3, this is scoped as a pilot-only negative-result demonstration.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 5 valid parent-child pairs are processed; probe training converges (accuracy > 0.7); absorption detection pipeline returns a finite domain score.

visualizations.description: Domain-specific absorption rate vs first-letter benchmark

tasks.name: E4 Pilot: Pareto tradeoff validation (2 families, 1 stratum)
tasks.description: Validate the Pareto analysis pipeline on a small matched stratum of Pythia-160M SAEBench SAEs (2 families, same hook point and width). Compute absorption, reconstruction, dead-neuron rate, and sparse probing F1.

pilot.pass_criteria: All checkpoints in the stratum load and compute successfully; Pareto front script runs without error; at least one non-dominated point per family.

tasks.name: E4 Full: Multi-objective Pareto on Pythia-160M (7 families)
tasks.description: Compute multi-objective Pareto fronts for 7 Pythia-160M architecture families, stratified by hook point and dictionary width. Normalize metrics within strata and test stochastic dominance. This is a supporting experiment, not the lead contribution.

visualizations.description: Pareto front scatter (absorption vs CE loss recovered)
